'''Danlea Lochner''', also known as '''Tara Warren''', was an agent of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Biography==
Tara Warren was the daughter of [[Morellian]] scoutmaster [[Barosa Warren]] and an unidentified mother. She was on bad terms with her father, especially after Tara joined the Rebel Alliance, opposing Barosa's wishes. Angry at Barosa, Tara even changed her legal name. She had three siblings, [[Roland Warren]], [[Tole Warren]], and [[Alton Lochner]] (who also changed his surname because of his poor relationship with Barosa). All of them were half-Morellian and they all eventually joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="air" />

Lochner was a contact for the Alliance [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations along the [[Ison Trade Corridor/Legends|Ison Corridor]].<ref name="air" />
